message:
feat(conformance): add runtime printf execution tests against fixtures

- Add frankenlibc-core dependency to harness for printf formatting fns
- Implement run_printf_case() to execute format strings with arguments
- Handle dynamic width/precision (*) argument consumption
- Add 4 runtime test categories: integer, string, float, flags/width
- Skip %g (implementation-specific threshold), %a (hex float), inf/nan
- All 24 conformance tests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
